Hero.description: Threedly is a bilingual platform where it feels easier to browse models, work with your profile, and build your own library.

type.two: Profile, library, and pricing inside one product.
type.three: A more premium feel for the archviz audience.

Pricing.subtitle: From first access to the library to steady studio-level work, Threedly plans are structured to grow with your workflow.

one.label: To start
one.value: Free lets you explore the catalog, personal library, and the base workflow of the platform.

two.label: To work
two.value: Pro is built for regular downloads, commercial use, and a more active day-to-day workflow.

three.label: For studios
three.value: Business fits teams that need stable access, broader usage rights, and a more predictable workflow.

free.name: Free
free.summary: Try the platform, save selections, and understand how Threedly fits into your process.

pro.name: Pro
pro.summary: The strongest option for designers and visualizers who work with models regularly in commercial projects.

business.name: Business
business.summary: For studios that need scale, broader usage rights, and a more stable team workflow.

Pricing.faqSubtitle: Short answers about plans, billing, and how the pricing structure works in a real workflow.
Pricing.faqNote: If your studio or team needs a different setup, pricing can evolve alongside the product.

one.question: Which plan is right for me?
one.answer: Start with Free to explore the library. Upgrade to Pro for commercial use or Business for team workflows.

two.question: What payment options do you accept?
two.answer: We accept major credit cards. Annual billing and invoices are available for Business plans.

three.question: Can I cancel or switch plans?
three.answer: Yes. You can change plans at any time and the new plan will take effect on your next billing cycle.

four.question: Do you offer refunds?
four.answer: We offer a 14-day refund window for paid plans. Contact support if you need help.

five.question: What happens if I hit usage limits?
five.answer: You can upgrade instantly or wait until limits reset at the start of the next billing cycle.

HowItWorks.title: From sign-up to your first library workflow
HowItWorks.subtitle: Three clear steps to enter the product, choose the right setup, and move into the model workflow.

one.title: Create account
one.description: Sign up with email and move straight into a bilingual interface with access to the core product areas.
one.caption: Your account is the entry point to the catalog, personal library, profile, and the next stages of the platform.

two.title: Choose your plan
two.description: Start with Free or pick the level that matches your download pace and the needs of your team.
two.caption: Your plan sets the way you work with the platform: for exploration, regular production, or studio use.

three.title: Download or publish
three.description: Move into the catalog, collect references in your personal library, and grow your profile on the platform.
three.caption: Threedly brings model discovery, account workflow, and the foundation for creator scenarios into one environment.

ForWho.title: Two different ways of working with 3D models
ForWho.subtitle: Threedly should work equally well for people sourcing models fast and for people who want a stronger presentation for their own work.

designers.label: Scenario 01
designers.title: Designers & Visualizers
designers.headline: Faster model selection for working scenes
designers.description: For people building interior scenes on deadlines and wanting to spend less time searching for the right asset.

one.label: Focus
one.value: Find the right model for a specific space faster

two.label: Important
two.value: Easy previewing, clear formats, and a direct path into the library

designers.note: Threedly should help narrow the search, surface the right model, and make it easy to return to it later in your library.

items.one: Narrow the search through categories, curated groupings, and a more readable page structure.
items.two: Judge models through previews, basic specifications, and cleaner content presentation.
items.three: Save selected items to the library so they are easier to revisit across new projects.

creators.label: Scenario 02
creators.title: Creators
creators.headline: A stronger presentation for work and profile
creators.description: For people who want not only to upload models, but to build a more professional presence around their work.

one.label: Focus
one.value: Present models, profile, and portfolio inside one environment

two.label: Important
two.value: Content trust, polished presentation, and a foundation for future growth

creators.note: The platform should strengthen how the work is perceived: from the first impression to the profile where models and author details come together.

items.one: Show models in an environment where attention stays on the work instead of on random interface noise.
items.two: Bring profile, models, and essential author details together in one professional space.
items.three: Grow with creator scenarios that support presentation quality and trust around the content.

FinalCta.title: Try Threedly now
FinalCta.subtitle: Browse the catalog or create an account and start working with the library inside a more composed, premium interface.

notes.one: The catalog helps move faster from search to a model selection for a specific project.
notes.two: Profile and library keep chosen models and the personal workspace together in one place.
notes.three: Free, Pro, and Max create the foundation for different working rhythms, from first use to studio workflows.
